title: Different Third Impacts huge plot hole
display_title: Different Third Impacts huge plot hole
wikitext:
[]: Different Third Impacts, huge plot hole?             Quote Post by Otaprince » Thu Sep 07, 2006 3:35 pm OK. So, here is a plot hole that I defy even Reichu to solve: Fact: SEELE sends Kaworu because they want to cause Third Impact. Fact: SEELE thinks that mankind has evolved as far as it can with flesh bodies and wants to initiate Complementation. Fact: SEELE send Kaworu to cause Third Impact. This must mean that a Third Impact caused by an Angel will bring about Complementation. This creates two problems with the plot of Eva: 1) why does SEELE support the creation of the Evas and fight the angels in the first place? If any of the 16 or whatever Angels had entered the Geofront, Seele's objective (Complementation) would be achieved. 2) This makes Kaworu's comments of "only one race can inherit the earth" (or whatever) somewhat meaningless-- Kaworu's line suggests that if Kaworu comes into contact with Lilith, perhaps only Angels will be complemented and humans will simply die. But this is contradicted by SEELE's motivation (and, incidentally, Eva manga stage 73)-- SEELE sends Kaworu to achieve complementation of both humans AND angels. arrrgh????

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Sep 07, 2006 3:37 pm It seems to me that SEELE might have sent Kaworu off just to get himself killed, but that doesn't make a huge amount of sense, either.

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Thu Sep 07, 2006 4:09 pm As best as I can figure it, SEELE sends Kaworu because Unit 01 is Gendo's only viable option, so they are forcing him to send it down into Terminal Dogma. Keel says it himself: "Now you have to use Unit 01!" Unit 01 has an S^2 engine now, so it is suitable for the Red Earth Purification Ceremony. And they have to send Kaworu as bait so that Gendo can absorb the necessary parts into the embryo in his hand to complete it. SEELE is manipulating Gendo into gathering all the pieces together. This also gives them time to organize ground forces. But... around here the Adam/Lilith dance gets confusing and I lose track of things. When it comes down to it, I have no idea. That's my best guess, though.

[]: Re: Different Third Impacts, huge plot hole?             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 07, 2006 4:14 pm Otaprince wrote: Fact: SEELE send Kaworu to cause Third Impact.

[]: Re: Different Third Impacts, huge plot hole?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 07, 2006 5:07 pm Ornette wrote: Otaprince wrote: Fact: SEELE send Kaworu to cause Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Sep 07, 2006 5:47 pm I always though that Kaworu was like SEELE's version of Rei; that he was created to initiate instrumentality, and that his death was something they did not intend to happen, which is why they sent the MP Evas to initiate 3I with Unit 01. I always assumed that if the angels start 3I, it would mean the destruction of the human race, whereas SEELE's vision is an "evolution" of the human race, which is why defeating the angels is essential.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Sep 07, 2006 5:56 pm Timstuff wrote: I always though that Kaworu was like SEELE's version of Rei; that he was created to initiate instrumentality, and that his death was something they did not intend to happen, which is why they sent the MP Evas to initiate 3I with Unit 01. I always assumed that if the angels start 3I, it would mean the destruction of the human race, whereas SEELE's vision is an "evolution" of the human race, which is why defeating the angels is essential.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Sep 07, 2006 5:59 pm Well, he was an Angel/human hybrid like Rei, so perhaps under the scenario that SEELE had planned, it would have resulted with human instrumentality. I always was under the assumption that Kaworu was SEELE's plan A, while the MP Eva series was plan B. I could be wrong, but that seemed to make the most sense to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Thu Sep 07, 2006 7:31 pm Ornette wrote: Wouldn't Kaworu initiating 3I mean the destruction of the human race?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Sep 07, 2006 10:19 pm Yeah, that's kind of what I figured too. Kaworu was given a human form so that SEELE could groom him as a tool for their scenario, but with the angels, no-one knows what they're planning, but given what happened during second impact, humans would probably be getting the short end of the stick. It probably involves "Angels for teh win!"

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Sep 08, 2006 12:38 am i wanna say it before Reichu says it... theres a Destructive Third Impact...made by angels... and a Constructive Third Impact...made by humans... there i said it first...but i dont feel like explaining it...so...yeah

[]: Re: Different Third Impacts, huge plot hole?             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Fri Sep 08, 2006 1:55 am Ornette wrote: Otaprince wrote: Fact: SEELE send Kaworu to cause Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 08, 2006 2:00 am Ornette wrote: It looks like they tried to trick him into making contact with Lilith, or something.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Fri Sep 08, 2006 4:23 am Ornette wrote: The only difference is they planned to use Eva-01 instead of Lilith because the LnY is gone.

[]:             Quote Post by ayanami_the_fifth » Fri Sep 08, 2006 7:34 am MayB that the SEELE wanted to cheat Kaworu [HE] into thinking that hes merging with his/her(ambiguity) original body (ADAM [SHE] ) while he discovered that it was lilith instead of adam...while SEELE's real intention is still unknown...lol... but explains Kaworu's wierd behaviour with Shinji...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Sep 08, 2006 7:50 am AuthenticM wrote: Ornette wrote: The only difference is they planned to use Eva-01 instead of Lilith because the LnY is gone.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Sep 08, 2006 10:31 am Reichu wrote: I sorta suspect they expected more out of Kaworu than just his death, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Sep 08, 2006 10:56 am Sudden idea: When Rei merged with Lilith she had Adams body with her. This resulted in an Adam/Lilith combo with Liliths soul in control, who is under the control of Ikari. Therefore, if Kaworu merged with EVA-02 (a substitute for Adams real body) and then merged with Lilith. Then the Adam/Lilith combo would be under the control of Adams soul (since that's what Kaworu has), which would be under the control of SEELE. Can't quit see how this links with everything else though.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 08, 2006 11:22 am Ornette wrote: That makes the most sense concerning why Seele sent Kaworu and why Kaworu seems to have mistaken Lilith for Adam. <snip> However, being that the lake scene was added NPC footage, it's possible that the whole thing is a continuity error (the size of Jupiter's red spot).

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Sep 08, 2006 12:18 pm That's pretty much what I was getting at. But if we go by the NPC, Kaworu knew that it was Lilith, and that he wouldn't be able to merge with his original body (since it's in Gendo); so he made the decision to take EVA-02 with him with the intention to merge with it. I'm reckoning that there were two scenarios, the two which I described in my previous post. Both of which involve this "forbidden union" of Adam and Lilith, but depending on the soul who entered (Kaworu/Adam or Rei/Lilith) would also effect who's in control: SEELE or Gendo. Which would explain why SEELE was getting their pants in a twist about Rei in #23, and why Gendo intended on protecting her.

Article: Different Third Impacts huge plot hole
 That's pretty much what I was getting at. But if we go by the NPC, Kaworu knew that it was Lilith, and that he wouldn't be able to merge with his original body (since it's in Gendo); so he made the decision to take EVA-02 with him with the intention to merge with it. I'm reckoning that there were two scenarios, the two which I described in my previous post. Both of which involve this "forbidden union" of Adam and Lilith, but depending on the soul who entered (Kaworu/Adam or Rei/Lilith) would also effect who's in control: SEELE or Gendo. Which would explain why SEELE was getting their pants in a twist about Rei in #23, and why Gendo intended on protecting her.
